hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); case "$f" in */app/Models/*.php|*/app/Modules/*/Models/*.php) cd "$(dirname "$f")"; while [ "$PWD" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$PWD/artisan" ]; do cd ..; done; [ -f "$PWD/artisan" ] && php artisan ide-helper:models --write --no-interaction --reset >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0
